fields.label: Showcase Audit Cadence (Days)
fields.description: How often each display case should be audited. Default: 7 (weekly)

fields.label: Backstock/Safe Audit Cadence (Days)
fields.description: How often back-stock and safe zones should be audited. Default: 30 (monthly)

fields.label: Full Store Reconciliation Cadence (Days)
fields.description: How often a full store reconciliation should occur. Default: 90 (quarterly)

fields.label: Daily Spot-Check Case
fields.description: High-value display case to be spot-checked daily at close-of-business

fields.label: Viance Threshold ($)
fields.description: Above this dollar value, the audit session freezes pending manager approval

fields.label: Variance Pieces Hard Stop
fields.description: More than this many missing pieces freezes reservations and transfers until cleared

fields.label: Auto-Create Shrinkage Entry on Finalize
fields.description: Automatically post Material Issue to Shrinkage warehouse for missing items below threshold

fields.label: Require Two-Person Sign-Off
fields.description: Manager + associate must both sign off on audits with variances

fields.label: AI Double-Count Verification (Future)
fields.description: If enabled, camera takes photos every N scans for ML verification
